notes: Reproduced consistently on Windows: parallel SKSvgCanvas text rendering produces empty <text> elements with missing text content and x/y attributes. Synchronous calls never trigger the bug. Reproduced on 3.116.0 (2-5/5 parallel tasks affected per run) and 3.119.1 (3-5/5 tasks affected). Bug appears FIXED on main branch (0/5 across 5 runs). This is a race condition in the DirectWrite glyph-to-unicode mapping path used by the SVG text builder on Windows.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console repro project with SkiaSharp 3.116.0
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p $TMPDIR/skiasharp/repro/3437 && cd $TMPDIR/skiasharp/repro/3437 && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.0
reproductionSteps.output:
The template "Console App" was created successfully.
PackageReference for package 'SkiaSharp' version '3.116.0' added.

reproductionSteps.description: Test with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 (latest stable) in fresh project directory
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p $TMPDIR/skiasharp/repro/3437-latest && cd $TMPDIR/skiasharp/repro/3437-latest && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.1 && dotnet run
reproductionSteps.output:
Run 1: FAILURE: Bug reproduced in 5 tasks
Run 2: FAILURE: Bug reproduced in 3 tasks
Bug still present in latest stable release.

reproductionSteps.description: Test with main branch source (built from source with project reference)
reproductionSteps.output:
Run 1-5: SUCCESS: test completed - no bugs found
All 5 runs passed — bug appears fixed on main branch (commit bf08d4d).

versionResults.notes: Bug reproduced consistently: 2-5 of 5 parallel tasks produce empty <text> elements per run. Synchronous calls unaffected.
Bug still present: 3-5 of 5 parallel tasks affected per run.
Bug not reproduced in 5 consecutive runs (0 failures). Bug appears fixed on main branch.

corrections.upstream: Bug requires investigation — no fix identified
corrections.corrected: Bug appears fixed on main branch (not yet released). Fix exists between 3.119.1 and current main.

actionability.reason: Bug reproduced on all tested NuGet versions (3.116.0, 3.119.1) but appears fixed on main branch. Fix has not been released yet, so issue should remain open until the fix ships in a stable release.

actions.description: Labels are already correct — type/bug, os/Windows-Classic, area/SkiaSharp, tenet/reliability, backend/SVG

workarounds: Serialize SVG text generation using a SemaphoreSlim(1,1) to prevent concurrent DirectWrite access
Upgrade to a future release that includes the main branch fix
